validation.fallbackIssue: The file format could not be validated.

help.title: How to prepare your .yml file
help.intro: CAW reads a simple YAML document. These three top-level fields are mandatory and must appear once each.
help.nameDesc: Human-readable project title shown in the app.
help.rangeDesc: Progress scale for leaf values. Minimum and maximum separated by ..
help.stagesDesc: Nested tree of stages. Branches are objects; leaves are numbers within range.
help.rule1: Use spaces for indentation (two spaces per level is a good default).
help.rule2: Only numeric leaves count toward progress; missing leaves are treated as the minimum of range.
help.rule3: Child stages may be written as a map or as a YAML list with - item; lists are normalized automatically.
help.rule4: Parent progress is the average of their children, rolled up through the tree.
help.rule5: Lines starting with # are comments and are ignored.
help.rule6: Do not repeat name, range, or stages at the top level.
help.startIntro: Download a minimal template or the full house example, edit it locally, then load it back in CAW.
